# transform html files scraped with python to usable csv


remove those without a winner
```{r}
tournaments = read.csv("parsed/tournaments-TCG-3.csv")
tournaments = tournaments[tournaments$winner != "",]
```


filter only tournaments from 6 months ago
```{r}

tournaments$event_date = as.Date(tournaments$event_date)


library("lubridate")

six_months_ago = Sys.Date() %m-% months(6)
tournaments_six_months = tournaments[tournaments$event_date >= six_months_ago,]
```

remove team events
```{r}

tournaments_six_months = tournaments_six_months[!grepl("Team", tournaments_six_months$name),]
```


```{r}
write.csv(tournaments_six_months, "parsed/tournaments-TCG-3-six_months.csv")
```
